templates.name: Flush WP cache after start
templates.description: Clears WordPress object cache so a fresh start sees an empty cache.

templates.name: Backup DB before stop
templates.description: Snapshots the database to wp-content/locorum-backups/ before the site stops.

templates.name: Print site URL after start
templates.description: Logs the primary URL to the run log — useful as a diagnostic placeholder.
